# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.

Write secure code.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-namespace
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-service
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-service-container
        image: my-service-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1000
          runAsGroup: 3000
          fsGroup: 2000
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "500m"
            memory: "512Mi"
          requests:
            cpu: "250m"
            memory: "256Mi"
      imagePullSecrets:
      - name: my-registry-secret

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-service
  ports:
  - protocol: TCP
    port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
  type: ClusterIP
